A1: Achieves the given integral with sufficient and no incorrect working seen including invisible brackets. You can ignore any limits for this mark. You can condone e.g. a missing “du” in the working as long as it is present in the final answer. B1: Correct limits seen at any stage and they do not need to be seen attached to the integral but if there is any contradiction, the limits attached to the integral take precedence.
